remarks: Beautifully maintained and thoughtfully updated, 160 Eden Road is set on 1.22 picturesque, level acres in a desirable North Stamford neighborhood, offering bright, inviting living spaces and the perfect balance of privacy and convenience. Filled with natural light, the thoughtfully designed floor plan features spacious rooms, beautiful hardwood floors, and an effortless flow for both everyday living and entertaining. The main level features an updated kitchen with a picture window overlooking the lovely backyard, spacious living and dining room, a den or home office, a generous primary suite, and two additional bedrooms. Updated bathrooms, fresh neutral interiors, and meticulous upkeep reflect the pride of ownership throughout. The finished lower-level family room/playroom provides comfortable additional living space, while the bright sunroom/breezeway opens to a slate patio overlooking the expansive level backyard providing an ideal setting for entertaining, gardening, outdoor play, or pets. Ideally located just minutes from shops and restaurants and the vibrant downtowns of Stamford and New Canaan, this exceptional property offers a peaceful residential setting with convenient access to shopping, dining, parks, recreation, and major commuting routes. A lovely home that offers the space, comfort, and location to enjoy for years to come!
